title: 13 Pcs Times Tables Multiplication Flash Cards, Times Tables Poster, 0-12 Times Table Math Flash Cards with 2 Dry Erase Markers and 2 Rings, Multiplicar Math Game for 1st to 3rd Grade
features: Pocket Size: The multiplication practice cards are 5X3inch in size, which can easily fit inside your bag or pocket with a loose-leaf ring, which can not only be used for storage, but can also be hung on your school bag.

Easy to use: Multiplication practice sheets are designed on both sides, with exercises on one side for practicing and answers on the other side for correcting errors. Wet paper towel can wipe away the handwriting, easy to repeat the practice.

Thoughtful set: The set includes a total of 15 multiplication flashcards include from 0-12, 2 metal flipchart rings, and 2 markers(one for answering questions and one for scoring). It can help 1st to 3rd grades students enhance their math skills and improve their scores in the subject.
Reliable Material: The multiplication flash cards are made of coated paper with double-sided lamination, waterproof and not easy to tear. Can be reused.

Ideal gift choice: Math Multiplication Flashcard Sheets are practical teaching materials for parents and teachers to help children learn math multiplication operations and build logical thinking and practical use of math.
